creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
How far along is Qt 5.9? Qt 5.7 is what we have in ports right now.
At any rate, I can certainly hold off on doing this or go with the new name.
Having a working port for myself as we speak, I don't much care either way, really.

What is your recommendation?
